reviews.review_description: Has sound clipping issue. Sound is distorted. Please fix this.

Nice game, it remids me Macross, i gave 5 stars because i paid few money but i would buy a better version vith more weapons a more stages and perhaps with possibility to choice different airplane with different features or something like that :)
Just recently bought this hidden gem.. Even after all this years of release, this game still stands on its own for the Oculus go! We need more games like this for the current and future vr hardware.

I am a huge fan of the Robotech  TV series
That ran in The United States in the 1980’s

       I hope this developer/programmer continues 
To make more of this type of first person  battle simulation games. 

      Not just for the Oculus Go but for the Oculus Quest as well. The Oculus Quest could support a multi-player version as an add on feature
As well as single combat mode.

      I highly recommend this this game to all Robotech  fan of all ages.
